summary: Frontend-only landing page for Third Rail Systems OÜ tested end-to-end via Playwright on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All 14 review checks passed: page renders, navbar/logo present, all hero copy (eyebrow, exact H1, ISO 31030 + GDPR subheadline, trust bar) is correct, both hero CTAs scroll to correct anchors (#contact and #compliance), all 3 problem cards / 3 platform features / 3 persona cards / 3 compliance rows have correct titles & tags, About section shows both founders + Estonia Advantage, contact form shows validation errors and error toast on empty submit, fills successfully shows the exact success toast 'Pilot assessment request received.' and resets the form, all desktop nav links smooth-scroll, mobile drawer opens with all nav items + CTA which closes drawer and scrolls to #contact. Zero console errors. Design is dark/clinical with cyan-400 accent, no purple/violet gradients, no contrast issues.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx is ~1130 lines. Consider splitting each section (Navbar, Hero, ProblemSection, etc.) into its own file under src/components/landing/ for maintainability. Not blocking.
ROLE_OPTIONS, NAV_LINKS, LOGO_URL could move to a constants file to keep the page component focused.

useReveal hook only runs once on mount — sections rendered conditionally later would not get observed. Not an issue today (all sections render up-front) but worth noting if more dynamic content is added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static landing page, no backend. All interactive elements expose data-testid. Form is frontend-only (650ms simulated delay) → Sonner toast. Both hero CTAs are wired to anchor-scroll (primary→#contact, secondary→#compliance). Mobile menu uses shadcn Sheet with mobile-menu-trigger / mobile-nav-link-* / mobile-nav-cta testids.
